text: **Why it's isolated:** this session (`@developer`) had `TENEX_EDGE_AGENT_FALLBACK=developer` in its env, and the MCP `who` tool's auto-provision fallback (the `chatgpt/echo123`-style identity you had built earlier today) only kicks in when *no* anchor resolves. The launched server runs with a scrubbed env (`env -i` + only `PATH/HOME/USER/TMPDIR/LANG`) and is fully reparented to `launchd` (verified `ppid=1`), so its 16-hop ancestor `pty_search` walk can't find "claude" and misattribute every ChatGPT/Grok request to your dev session.
